title: No Mercy
description: This modpack is a collection of 30 hardcore mods and 1 resource pack that will make your game much more challenging than ever before. Mobs now have improved AI, zombies and skeletons no longer burn in sunlight, and the rest... you'd better see for yourself
body:
![no Mercy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38c0df2b5c1f55eda97864cebbbca895b8cdc892.png)                   

The No Mercy modpack will give you unforgettable feelings of true hardcore that you’ll never forget. Now, using a Totem of Undying applies negative effects. Zombies and skeletons no longer burn in sunlight, their AI has been improved, and some zombies now spawn with enchanted gear. A temperature system has been added, and meteors can fall on you if you stay AFK for too long. Good luck and enjoy the challenge!
